notes:
The game loads fine until a cutscene begins, where the screen remains blank while the audio plays. The scene skip doesn't work, and the screen remains black when the audio finishes.
Tried "Disable Esync", "Disable D3d11" and "Use Wine D3d11"
Tested under NixOS 19.03.
title: Skylar & Plux: Adventure On Clover Island

gpu: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2070 with Max-Q Design
notes: Same experience as other report. Menu loaded fine (although it wouldn't properly fullscreen, even in borderless). Opening cutscene is a black screen with audio. You cannot skip it, and nothing loads once it is completed.
title: Skylar & Plux: Adventure On Clover Island
